metadata.description: Prescyent productized plugin ladder. Discover how your company works, map it, build the context layer, and deliver outcomes — all inside your own AI workspace.

plugins.name: prescyent-plugin
plugins.description: Connect your tools (HubSpot, Drive, Gmail, Notion, Fathom, etc.) and run /discover. Up to five agents read your actual data + your Cowork session history in parallel and produce a one-page AI readiness audit inline in your chat. The report grades your company on eight dimensions, names the top three moves you can make this week — including behavioral patterns the audit pulled from how you actually use Claude — and points at the path forward. Then run /kb-build to scaffold a living wiki on your own drive — interviewing your senior people to capture the work nobody wrote down — that every future Claude, ChatGPT, or agent session reads from.
